allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"- {h['title']} | {h['slug']} | {h.get\('description',''\)} | downloads: {h.get\('downloads',0\)}\\"\) for h in data.get\('hits',[]\)]")

Bash("/c/Program Files/PuTTY/plink" -ssh -pw 'REDACTED' -batch -hostkey 'SHA256:jyBisVeqmrEVI7ZnwPKkF+ooGNml70q8/c3UpCNRFv0' bill@192.168.0.200 "echo '=== OS ==='; cat /etc/os-release | head -5; echo '=== CPU ==='; grep 'model name' /proc/cpuinfo | head -1; grep -c processor /proc/cpuinfo | xargs echo 'cores:'; echo '=== RAM ==='; free -h | head -2; echo '=== GPU lspci ==='; lspci | grep -i -E 'vga|display|3d|nvidia|amd|intel.*graphics'; echo '=== nvidia-smi ==='; which nvidia-smi && nvidia-smi 2>&1 | head -5 || echo 'no nvidia-smi'; echo '=== Ollama ==='; which ollama; ollama --version 2>&1; echo '=== Ollama list ==='; ollama list 2>&1; echo '=== Ollama service ==='; systemctl is-active ollama 2>&1; echo '=== Ollama port ==='; ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep 11434 || netstat -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep 11434")

Bash("/c/Program Files/PuTTY/plink" -ssh -pw 'REDACTED' -batch -hostkey 'SHA256:jyBisVeqmrEVI7ZnwPKkF+ooGNml70q8/c3UpCNRFv0' bill@192.168.0.200 "echo '=== DISK ==='; df -h / /var /home 2>/dev/null | grep -v tmpfs; echo '=== OLLAMA MODELS DIR ==='; du -sh /usr/share/ollama/.ollama/models 2>/dev/null || du -sh ~/.ollama/models 2>/dev/null || sudo du -sh /root/.ollama/models 2>/dev/null; echo '=== CPU FLAGS ==='; grep -o -E 'avx[0-9]*|fma|sse4_[12]|f16c' /proc/cpuinfo | sort -u; echo '=== OLLAMA SERVER LOG \(last GPU detection\) ==='; sudo journalctl -u ollama --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -i -E 'gpu|cuda|rocm|cpu|amx|avx' | tail -10 || echo 'no journalctl access'")

Bash("/c/Program Files/PuTTY/plink" -ssh -pw 'REDACTED' -batch -hostkey 'SHA256:jyBisVeqmrEVI7ZnwPKkF+ooGNml70q8/c3UpCNRFv0' bill@192.168.0.200 "nohup ollama pull qwen2.5:3b > /tmp/pull_qwen.log 2>&1 & nohup ollama pull gemma2:2b > /tmp/pull_gemma.log 2>&1 & echo 'pulls started'; sleep 2; echo '=== ollama show llama3.2:latest ==='; ollama show llama3.2:latest 2>&1 | head -20")
